title: Workhorse Secures GSA Contract for Government Fleet Access
text: Workhorse Group announced that it has been added to the GSA Schedule, awarded a General Services Administration Government Fleet Contract through Colonial Fleet Electrification. The GSA contract, GS-30F-RA005, is listed under Special Item Number 493E, making Workhorse vehicles readily available on the GSAFleet.gov platform. This allows federal government agencies to streamline procurement of Workhorse's American-made electric commercial vehicles in the W56 platform. The GSA contract provides federal agencies with a reliable, efficient transportation solution and complements Workhorse's growing network of cooperative purchasing agreements including Sourcewell, the Florida Sheriff's Association Purchasing Program, OMNIA Partners, and PASSPort (The City of New York's end-to-end digital procurement platform). This represents a significant milestone for Workhorse as a manufacturer of zero-emission electric commercial vehicles.
